name: ai-employees-plugins
description: Enterprise AI employee plugins for cross-border e-commerce — customer support, influencer outreach, ad creative, Shopify growth, B2B sales, and agent evaluation.

plugins.name: customer-support
plugins.description: Triage tickets, draft responses, escalate risks, identify knowledge base gaps.

plugins.name: influencer-outreach
plugins.description: Research creators, draft icebreakers, classify replies, manage usage rights.

plugins.name: ad-creative
plugins.description: Analyze videos, segment UGC, score hooks, review compliance.

plugins.name: shopify-growth
plugins.description: Optimize product pages, audit SEO, analyze user behavior, generate FAQ.

plugins.name: b2b-sales
plugins.description: Qualify leads, draft quotes, follow up, escalate high-value opportunities.

plugins.name: agent-evaluation
plugins.description: Golden set testing, regression tests, grayscale release, error review.
